diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect_utils.py
+++ b/inspect_utils.py
@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+import sys

+import inspect

+

+sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

+import tsr.utils

+

+for name, obj in inspect.getmembers(tsr.utils):

+    if inspect.isfunction(obj):

+        print(f'=== {name} ===')

+        try:

+            print(inspect.getsource(obj))

+        except Exception as e:

+            print(e)
